title: Marketplace Manager - OYO Rooms - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - OYO Rooms - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the OYO Rooms family as a Marketplace Manager in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About OYO Rooms:
OYO Rooms is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OYO Rooms!
